commit_message:
[i2c/rtl] Use host enable rising edge for SDA interference [i2c/rtl] Use host enable rising edge for SDA interference Fix as suggested in: https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/issues/17811

Running this PR on top of: https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/pull/17809
Using the following command:
`util/dvsim/dvsim.py hw/ip/i2c/dv/i2c_sim_cfg.hjson  -i   i2c_host_error_intr --tool xcelium  --fixed-seed 3743598109 --waves shm`
It still fails, but at a later point:
```
* `UVM_ERROR (i2c_host_err
```
